collectors.title: Database
collectors.titleDetails: (9 total Queries, 9 of them unique across 1 Connection)

queries.sql: SELECT DISTINCT YEAR(published_at) as year, MONTH(published_at) as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM posts WHERE status = 'published' AND visibility = 'public' GROUP BY YEAR(published_at), MONTH(published_at) ORDER BY YEAR(published_at) DESC, MONTH(published_at) DESC

timelineData.name: Query
timelineData.query: SELECT DISTINCT YEAR(published_at) as year, MONTH(published_at) as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM posts WHERE status = 'published' AND visibility = 'public' GROUP BY YEAR(published_at), MONTH(published_at) ORDER BY YEAR(published_at) DESC, MONTH(published_at) DESC

View Data.about_description: 欢迎来到我们的博客系统！这是一个基于 CodeIgniter 4 框架开发的现代化博客平台，旨在为用户提供一个简单、高效、美观的内容发布和分享平台
View Data.team_intro: 我们是一个充满激情和创造力的开发团队，致力于为用户提供最好的博客系统体验
